The '''Kurdin system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|solar system]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Nomlis III]]. It was there where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Bretie Facility]], a production center for the [[TIE Experimental Project]], was [[Battle of Nomlis III|destroyed]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Supposedly, the Empire had a large presence in the system.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
